title: hieracium praecox subsp. fragile
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. fragile, also known as sensitive hawkweed, is a subspecies of plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hieracium praecox subsp. fragile include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
